title: dortmanna coronopifolia var. paucidentata
intro: Dortmanna coronopifolia var. paucidentata, also known as the lesser swamp dock, is a perennial plant species in the dock family (Rumex). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna coronopifolia var. paucidentata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds, and internally to support digestive health.
